title: Building a Natural Language Processing Chatbot
scenario: Create a natural language processing chatbot that can understand and respond to a set of user intents. The chatbot should be able to handle multiple user queries and provide accurate responses. Use a machine learning-based NLP algorithm and include specific features such as intent recognition and entity extraction.
constraints: Must use a machine learning-based NLP algorithm
Must include a minimum of 5 user intents

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated chatbot accurately recognizes user intents.
Check if the generated chatbot provides accurate responses to user queries.
Assess the scalability of the generated chatbot.
